meaning: n.构造组成,编织(工艺或方式)
examples: The paper has improved the contexture methodology of basic probability of D-S Reasoning when its application in information temporal-spatial fusion.
Euclid geometry can be regarded as an abstraction of nature. Comparing to Euclid geometry's simpleness, Fractal geometry reflects natural contexture more veritably.
This method is successfully applied into the automatic identifying system for the fabric contexture model, and a higher mosaic speed and a better mosaic effect are achieved.
